---
title: "Appendix C: Recommended R Packages by Use Case"
appendix: true
---

## Data Import

-   `readr`
-   `readxl`
-   `vroom`

## Data Cleaning

-   `dplyr`
-   `janitor`
-   `stringr`
-   `lubridate`

## Data Transformation

-   `tidyr`
-   `purrr`

## Visualization

-   `ggplot2`
-   `scales`

## Reporting

-   `quarto`
-   `rmarkdown`
-   `gt`

## File Paths and Project Hygiene

-   `here`
-   `fs`

Placeholder for fuller package notes and usage examples.
